title: LE17 5NR, Elvidge Farms Limited: full surrender issued - EPR/TP3639UU/S003
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter and decision document for:   Operator name: Elvidge Farms Limited Installation name: Flat House Farm Pig Unit Permit number: EPR/TP3639UU  "
